topic: stable storage conditions for bottle ageing
trigger_keywords: almacenar botellas de vino tinto con corcho natural
envejecimiento adecuado de vinos finos embotellados
proteger vinos de calidad durante su almacenamiento a largo plazo
temperatura estable, oscuridad y humedad moderada
objetivo clave de la conservación del vino en bodegas comerciales
minimizar la evaporación y evolución prematura
temperatura recomendada para almacenar vinos de guarda a largo plazo
buena práctica para almacenar vinos a largo plazo
ambiente oscuro y fresco con humedad controlada
deterioro del vino por mala conservación
pérdida de aromas primarios y color apagado

steps.label: cause
steps.text: A bottled wine is stored for an extended period before service.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: A cool, dark, vibration-free environment with a stable temperature slows chemical change; when the wine has a natural cork, horizontal storage keeps the wine in contact with it.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: Premature oxidation and heat damage are less likely, allowing bottle development to proceed more slowly and consistently.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: Premature oxidation and heat damage are less likely, allowing bottle development to proceed more slowly and consistently.

_meta.source_note: Inferred formative model - not official WSET assessment or mark-scheme content
